CustomField.description: Lookup to the IndividualApplication (NEPA process) this comment was submitted against. Required for the NEPA_Comment_Period_Gate before-save flow and the NEPA_Comment_Period_Closed validation rule to enforce exact-minute comment period deadlines without human admin intervention.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The NEPA process (IndividualApplication) this comment responds to. Set by the portal OmniScript on submission.
CustomField.label: Related NEPA Process
